segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The development of bird ringing, by a Danish schoolteacher, Hans Christian Cornelius Mortensen, made many discoveries possible.
segments.zh: 丹麦教师汉斯·克里斯蒂安·科尼利厄斯·莫滕森开创了鸟类环志法，这使得许多发现成为可能。这种方法至今仍很常见，它依赖于所谓的“回收”——即当环志鸟在迁徙地死亡后被找到并识别。20世纪早期收集了大量数据，人类历史上首次了解了鸟类冬季的实际去向。1931年出版了一本地图集，展示了欧洲最常见鸟类迁徙的目的地。关于鸟类迁徙的更多近期理论……

words.def: 环志（给鸟戴上脚环以追踪）
回收；找回（此处指发现环志鸟）

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is still common practice today and relies upon what is known as 'recovery' – this is when ringed birds are found dead in the place they have migrated to, and identified.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Huge amounts of data were gathered in the early part of the twentieth century and for the first time in history people understood where birds actually went to in winter.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In 1931, an atlas was published showing where the most common species of European birds migrated to.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: More recent theories about bird migration ...

items.prompt: Most birds are believed to migrate seasonally.
In autumn he observed that redstarts experience the loss of
Aristotle's assumptions were logical because the two species of birds had a similar
Charles Morton popularised the idea that birds fly to the
In 1822, a stork was killed in Germany which had an African spear in its
previously there had been no evidence that storks migrate to Africa
Little was known about the routes and journeys of migrating birds until the practice of ringing was established.
It was thought large birds carried small birds on some journeys because they were considered incapable of travelling across huge
Ringing depended on what is called the 'method' of dead birds.

pairs.note: 题干中的'method'被原文中的'recovery'替换，两者都指代同一概念。
题干中的'dead birds'在原文中被具体化为'ringed birds are found dead'，意思相同但表达更详细。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'relies upon what is known as 'recovery' – this is when ringed birds are found dead'，与题干'Ringing depended on what is called the 'method' of dead birds'对应，其中'method'被'recovery'替换，'dead birds'被'ringed birds are found dead'替换。

items.prompt: In 1931, the first map to show the migration of European birds was printed.

pairs.q: first map to show the migration of European birds
pairs.p: an atlas was published showing where the most common species of European birds migrated to
pairs.note: 'map' 被替换为 'atlas'（地图集），'show the migration' 被替换为 'showing where ... migrated to'（展示迁徙目的地）。
'printed'（印刷）与 'published'（出版）在此语境下同义。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接提到 'In 1931, an atlas was published showing where the most common species of European birds migrated to'，与题干 'In 1931, the first map to show the migration of European birds was printed' 对应，其中 'atlas' 是答案。
